title: Message Received | Pet Emergency Center Fort Lauderdale
description: Your message has been received by Pet Emergency Center. We will get back to you during operating hours. For emergencies, call (954) 772-0420 directly.
ogDescription: Your message has been received. We will get back to you during operating hours.

main:
Message Received

Your Message Has Been Received.

Thank you for reaching out. Our team will get back to you during operating hours. We read every message that comes through.

Call (954) 772-0420 Back to Home
Confirmed
When to expect a reply

Response Times.

Most messages receive a response within one to two business days during operating hours. Records requests, billing questions, and routine inquiries may take slightly longer depending on volume. Career and referring vet inquiries are typically routed to Paige directly.

Safety net

If This Was an Emergency.

If you submitted the contact form because your pet is in distress, please pick up the phone right now. Forms are checked during operating hours, but emergencies need a call.

For emergencies, call (954) 772-0420. We are open weeknights and 24/7 on weekends and holidays.

Call (954) 772-0420
While You Wait

Learn More About the Practice.

If you would like to learn more about the practice while you wait for our response, here are a few places to start.

Our Story

The independent and locally owned practice serving South Florida for over 40 years.

Read Our Story →

Common Emergencies

What to watch for and what to do.

See Common Emergencies →

Telemedicine

Talk to one of our veterinarians from anywhere in Florida.

Learn About Telehealth →

Thank You.

Thank you for getting in touch. We will be back to you soon.
